description: Redact Personally Identifiable Information (PII) from the 'PatientConnector' legacy project to prepare it for open-source release. Scrub all Social Security Numbers (XXX-XX-XXXX) by replacing them with the string 'XXX-XX-XXXX' and all Medical Record Numbers (MRN-XXXXXX) by replacing them with 'MRN-000000'. This redaction must be applied comprehensively across all Java source files, XML files, properties files, and logs within the project.
